# External dependencies

CMake will download and build the external libraries automatically. 

The external libraries are as follows:

## HElib

From the official [HElib github](https://github.com/homenc/HElib/), set to version 2.2.1.

## NTL 

Requires NTL, downloaded from the official [NTL Website](https://www.shoup.net/ntl/), set to version 11.5.1.

## GMP

Requires GMP, downloaded from the official [GMP Website](https://gmplib.org/download/gmp/), set to version 6.2.1.

## M4RI

From the [M4RI github](https://github.com/malb/m4ri).
